2 productive, healthy fig trees on both sides of the building. You need to enter the white gate. I also saw some young pomegranate trees. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

Located in a shopping center, owners never harvest plums, Very sweet and tart. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-May.

Off property on sidebar, lots of plums but pruning by gardeners may affect this. Fruits are sour when barely ripe but delicious and musky. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: April-May.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Owners gave me access to overhang, plums are lightly sweet, big, juicy with a pink skin and when overripe turn purple and mealy. Tree is super healthy and the harvest is bountiful. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
